cause_analysis.narrative: Spa Valencia churned on 2026-02-02 after 227 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 47 times, but the client only replied 0. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn. 4 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
[SLA] 4 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-13 via email, client wrote: "Subject: \n\nBody: https://www.google.com/search?q=Desert+Zen+Massage&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAA_-NgU1I1qLAwSzEzSEs1sTSzNEs2NjW2…" — no outbound response in 33 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-13 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Link\n\nBody: https://www.google.com/search?q=Desert+Zen+Massage&stick=H4sIAAAAAAAA_-NgU1I1qLAwSzEzSEs1sTSzNEs2…" — no outbound response in 33 days.
